commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds runtime external OAuth provenance metadata, changes auth-profile save/load merge behavior to keep runtime-only external CLI OAuth profiles in memory while filtering disk persistence, and expands auth-profile regression tests.

PR surface: Source +382, Tests +959. Total +1341 across 8 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the PR-introduced blocker from source: after the new save path installs a runtime snapshot with `runtimeExternalProfileIds`, `ensureAuthProfileStoreWithoutExternalProfiles` re-enters itself through `loadAuthProfileStoreWithoutExternalProfiles`. I did not run tests in this read-only checkout.
commands.review_followup: The PR is already in the ClawSweeper automerge lane and has one narrow, source-local blocker suitable for an automated repair before merge.

target.title: Preserve runtime external auth snapshots
target.author: turbotheturtle
